description.plain:
You place the bird carving on the pedestal and the statue's EYES LIGHT UP and you hear a faint ringing within your mind.

...caw.... caw caaaawww...

The pedestal opens and a strange fluid begins to pour out.
Naturally, you drink it all.

runs.text: You place the bird carving on the pedestal and the statue's EYES LIGHT UP and you hear a faint ringing within your mind.

The pedestal opens and a strange fluid begins to pour out.
Naturally, you drink it all.

description.plain:
You open a dusty box to find a set of 3 elaborate wood carvings:

A bird, snake, and... a torus?

A nearby pedestal has indentations which match the bottom of the carvings. Which carving will you place on the pedestal?

runs.text:

A bird, snake, and... a torus?

A nearby pedestal has indentations which match the bottom of the carvings. Which carving will you place on the pedestal?

description.plain: Choose 1 starter card to Transform into {BirdCard}.
None of your cards can be Enchanted with Slither.

runs.text: None of your cards can be Enchanted with

description.plain: Choose 1 starter card to Transform into {ToricCard}.
You place the snake carving on the pedestal and the statue's SCALES LIGHT UP! You feel a bit warm, comfortable, and wobbly.

runs.text: You place the snake carving on the pedestal and the statue's SCALES LIGHT UP! You feel a bit warm, comfortable, and wobbly.

description.plain:
You place the torus carving on the pedestal and your STOMACH LIGHTS UP as the statue transforms into a piping hot fried confection. An insatiable hunger takes over and you quickly consume the donut.

You feel tougher, but slower.
